name: linear
description: Linear workflow helpers for the mcp-handcraft local MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and track Linear work from mcp-handcraft.
interface.longDescription: A repo-local Codex plugin scaffold for Linear workflows in mcp-handcraft. Use it to collect Linear-oriented skills, MCP configuration, and handoff helpers as this integration grows.
defaultPrompt: Summarize the current Linear delivery state.
Draft a Linear handoff note for this branch.
List the next repo tasks to track in Linear.
